name: Pendleton 2

movements.notes: approx. 8 km, undulating terrain including soft sand
approx. 11 km dirt-road, over 1,400 ft of elevation gain

description: The same swim-bike-run course as Pendleton 1, run again as a separate scored event.
source_notes: games.crossfit.com/workouts/games/2012/12 (official CrossFit Games event), retrieved 2026-07-10; scored at the full finish of the same continuous swim/bike/run race as Pendleton 1
